---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or false positive in Windfall AntiCheat
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Type of Bug
- [ ] False Positive (legitimate player flagged)
- [ ] False Negative (cheater not detected)
- [ ] Plugin Crash
- [ ] Configuration Issue
- [ ] Other

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Step one
2. Step two
3. ...

## Expected Behavior
What should happen instead.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happens.

## Server Information
- **Minecraft Version:** (e.g., 1.20.4)
- **Server Software:** (e.g., Paper, Spigot, Purpur)
- **Server Version:** (e.g., build #123)
- **Java Version:** (e.g., 17, 21)

## Windfall AntiCheat Version
(e.g., v1.0, latest commit hash)

## Logs
```
Paste relevant error messages or console logs here
```

## Configuration
```yaml
Paste relevant config sections here (if applicable)
```

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (player ping, modifications, etc.).
